overall.description: Gameplay footage from a cinematic action game showing a samurai warrior running through a snowy mountain landscape. The character traverses a narrow rocky canyon, passes through a traditional wooden torii gate, and continues into an open snow-covered valley during a light snowfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain canyon with large rock formations

massive snow-covered boulder flanking the right side of the narrow path
leafless tree with twisted branches standing in the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow snow-covered canyon flanked by massive rock formations. The samurai character runs steadily forward through the confined space, passing snow-dusted bushes and approaching a bare tree in the center of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain path lined with tall grass approaching a wooden shrine gate

events.description: rocky canyon opens up to wider trail with tall grass and wooden torii gate visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: running along the snowy path toward the wooden torii gate

tall snow-covered grass and reeds lining the left side of the path
tall snow-covered grass and reeds lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens into a wider path lined with tall snow-covered grass. The wooden torii gate becomes visible in the distance and grows larger as the character approaches, while the massive rock formations fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow-covered mountain valley beyond the shrine gate

events.description: passing through the wooden torii gate into the open mountain valley

agents.ego_description: running through the torii gate and continuing into the open snowy valley

steep snow-covered mountain slope rising in the background on the right
snow-covered shrubs and small bushes scattered across the landscape

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the torii gate into a wide-open snow-covered valley. The path continues between gentle mountain slopes, with scattered bushes replacing the tall grass as the character runs deeper into the wintry landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a samurai runs from a claustrophobic rocky canyon into a vast, open snowy valley. It begins within a narrow passage flanked by massive rock formations, moving past snow-dusted bushes and a solitary bare tree. As the character advances, the confined space expands into a wider path lined with tall snow-covered grass, while the towering rocks recede to reveal a wooden torii gate ahead. The scene then opens completely as the character passes through the gate, shifting from the guided path into a wide-open wintry landscape. Finally, the camera follows the warrior deeper into the valley between gentle mountain slopes, where the tall grass gives way to scattered bushes under a light snowfall.
